user.title: Connect to cctvQL
user.description: Enter the host and port where your cctvQL server is running.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to cctvQL. Check the host and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: cctvQL is already configured for this host.

query.name: Query
query.description: Ask cctvQL a natural language question about your cameras.

query.name: Query
query.description: Natural language question, e.g. "Were there people on the driveway last night?"

session_id.name: Session ID
session_id.description: Session ID for multi-turn conversations (default: homeassistant).

ptz.name: PTZ
ptz.description: Send a pan/tilt/zoom command to a camera.

camera_id.name: Camera ID
camera_id.description: Camera ID as shown in the cameras list.

action.name: Action
action.description: PTZ action: left, right, up, down, zoom_in, zoom_out, home, preset.

clear_session.name: Clear Session
clear_session.description: Clear the cctvQL conversation history for a session.
